name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

VARIABLE state \* state[p] ∈ {"idle", "trying", "critical"} for each process p

(* Initial state: all processes are idle *)
Init == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = "idle"

(* Transition for a process p *)
Next == 
    \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
    \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "trying"
        /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
    \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A p, q \in 1..N : p # q => ~(state[p] = "critical" /\ state[q] = "critical")

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N, Participants, Coordinator

ASSUME
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ Participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Coordinator \in 1..N

VARIABLES
    state,
    msgQueue,
    votes,
    commitDecided

(* Participant states *)
ParticipantState == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Message types *)
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Message record *)
Message == [sender: 1..N, receiver: 1..N, type: MessageType]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
    /\ msgQueue = <<>>
    /\ votes = {}
    /\ commitDecided = FALSE

(* Sending a message: enqueue *)
SendMsg(msg) ==
    /\ msgQueue' = Append(msgQueue, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, commitDecided>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ \A p \in Participants:
        SendMsg([sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, commitDecided>>

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Init"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
    /\ SendMsg([sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgQueue, votes, commitDecided>>

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "Init"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
    /\ SendMsg([sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgQueue, votes, commitDecided>>

(* Coordinator processes a VoteYes *)
CoordinatorProcessVoteYes ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        msgQueue[1] = [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"]
    /\ votes' = votes \cup {p}
    /\ msgQueue' = Tail(msgQueue)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, commitDecided>>

(* Coordinator processes a VoteNo *)
CoordinatorProcessVoteNo ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants:
        msgQueue

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N \* Number of philosophers and forks

VARIABLES
    state, \* state[i] ∈ {"Thinking", "Hungry", "Eating"}
    forks \* forks[i] = i+1 if philosopher i holds fork i, else 0

(* Helper definitions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 0 THEN N-1 ELSE i-1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N-1 THEN 0 ELSE i+1

(* Initial state: all thinking, no forks held *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "Thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can eat *)
CanEat(i) == state[i] = "Hungry"
              /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
              /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i starts eating (takes forks) *)
TakeForks(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Eating"]
               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i+1,
                                            ![RIGHT(i)] = i+1]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks and thinks *)
PutForks(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Thinking"]
              /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0,
                                       ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          (state[i] = "Thinking" /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i))
          \/ (state[i] = "Hungry" /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i))
          \/ (state[i] = "Eating" /\ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ N > 0
          /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"Thinking", "Hungry", "Eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [0..N-1 -> Nat]
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i+1

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \* Number of processes

VARIABLES
    num, \* Sequence of natural numbers, one per process
    flag   \* Sequence of booleans, one per process

(* Helper definitions *)
\* Index set of processes
PROCIDS == 1..N

\* The maximum ticket number currently in use
MaxNum == IF Len(num) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Max(num)

\* The next ticket number to assign
NextNum == MaxNum + 1

\* Predicate: process i is choosing a number
Choosing(i) == flag[i] = TRUE

\* Predicate: process i has a ticket number
HasNum(i) == flag[i] = FALSE /\ num[i] # 0

\* Predicate: process i is in the critical section
InCS(i) == flag[i] = FALSE /\ num[i] > 0

\* Predicate: process i is in the waiting state
Waiting(i) == flag[i] = FALSE /\ num[i] = 0

\* Predicate: process i is in the exit state
Exit(i) == flag[i] = FALSE /\ num[i] = 0

\* Predicate: process i is in the entry state
Entry(i) == flag[i] = TRUE

Init ==
    /\ num \in [PROCIDS -> 0]
    /\ flag \in [PROCIDS -> FALSE]

Next ==
    \E i \in PROCIDS :
        \E action \in {"choose", "enter", "critical", "exit"} :
            CASE action = "choose" ->
                /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = NextNum]
            [] action = "enter" ->
                /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
            [] action = "critical" ->
                /\ flag' = flag
                /\ num' = num
            [] action = "exit" ->
                /\ flag' = flag
                /\ num' = num

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, storing the elements *)
(* head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1) *)
(* size is the number of elements in the queue *)

Init ==
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, 0) \* initialize all slots to 0
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ LET newTail == (tail + 1) % K
       IN  /\ q' = Subst(q, tail, 1) \* write 1 as a placeholder for produced item
           /\ tail' = newTail
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head
           /\ q' = q

ConsumerAction ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ LET newHead == (head + 1) % K
       IN  /\ q' = Subst(q, head, 0) \* consume by resetting slot to 0
           /\ head' = newHead
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = q

Next ==
    \/ ProducerAction
    \/ ConsumerAction

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1, 0..1)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, votesReceived

(* Definitions *)
majority == (|Servers| \div 2) + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = "None"
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ votesReceived = 0

(* Actions *)
RequestVote(cand, term) ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ term >= currentTerm
    /\ (votedFor = "None" \/ votedFor = cand)
    /\ currentTerm' = term
    /\ votedFor' = cand
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votesReceived' = votesReceived

StartElection ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = "Self"
    /\ state' = "Candidate"
    /\ votesReceived' = 1

ReceiveVote(term, voter) ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ term = currentTerm
    /\ votesReceived' = votesReceived + 1
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = state

BecomeLeader ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ votesReceived >= majority
    /\ state' = "Leader"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ votesReceived' = votesReceived

SendHeartbeat ==
    /\ state = "Leader"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votesReceived' = votesReceived

Timeout ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = "None"
    /\ state' = "Candidate"
    /\ votesReceived' = 1

NoOp ==
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votesReceived' = votesReceived

Next ==
    \/ RequestVote(cand, term)
    \/ StartElection
    \/ ReceiveVote(term, voter)
    \/ BecomeLeader
    \/ SendHeartbeat
    \/ Timeout
    \/ NoOp

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in {"None"} \cup Servers
    /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
    /\ votesReceived \in Nat

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, stat

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init ==
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReaderAcquire ==
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers + 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReaderRelease ==
    /\ readers > 0
    /\ readers' = readers - 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriterAcquire ==
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    /\ readers' = readers

WriterRelease ==
    /\ writer_active = TRUE
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers

Next ==
    \/ ReaderAcquire
    \/ ReaderRelease
    \/ WriterAcquire
    \/ WriterRelease

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ readers \in Nat
    /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

    N \in Nat,          \* Number of processes
    Channels \subseteq 1..N \X 1..N \ { (i,i) \mid i \in 1..N } \* Set of directed channels

VARIABLES
    state,          \* state[p] is the local state of process p
    channelState,   \* channelState[c] is the sequence of messages on channel c
    markerSent,     \* markerSent[p] is the set of channels on which p has sent a marker
    recorded,       \* recorded[p] is TRUE iff process p has recorded its state
    markerReceived  \* markerReceived[p] is the set of channels on which p has received a marker

(* Helper definitions *)
Channel(p, q) == [p, q] \in Channels

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> SUBSET Channels]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> SUBSET Channels]
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : markerSent[p] = {} /\ recorded[p] = FALSE /\ markerReceived[p] = {}

(* Sending a marker along an outgoing channel *)
SendMarker(p, q) ==
    /\ Channel(p, q)
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p] = @ \cup { [p, q] }]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![[p, q]] = @ \cat << "marker" >>]
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, recorded, markerReceived >>

(* Sending a normal message along an outgoing channel *)
SendMsg(p, q, m) ==
    /\ Channel(p, q)
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![[p, q]] = @ \cat << m >>]
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, markerSent, recorded, markerReceived >>

(* Receiving a message from an incoming channel *)
Receive(p, c) ==
    /\ c \in Channels
    /\ c[2] = p
    /\ channelState[c] \neq <<>>
    /\ LET m == Head(channelState[c]) IN
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channelState[c])]
        /\ IF m = "marker" THEN
            /\ IF NOT recorded[p] THEN
                /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
                /\ markerReceived' = [

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    Keys,          \* finite set of keys
    Values         \* finite set of values

VARIABLES
    store          \* mapping from Keys to Values

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] = Values[1]   \* assume Values[1] is the initial value

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Put operation: update the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Get operation: read the current value for a key *)
Get(k) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ store' = store

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == 
    \E k \in Keys, v \in Values: Put(k, v)
    \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

VARIABLES
    fileChunks,          \* Sequence of chunks to send
    sentChunks,          \* Sequence of chunks that have been sent
    pendingChunk,        \* Current chunk being sent
    retransmitCount,     \* Number of retransmissions attempted for current chunk
    channelState,        \* State of the channel: "idle", "sending", "lost", "ack"
    finished              \* Boolean indicating whether transfer is complete

(* Helper definitions *)
ChunkSeq == SubSeq(fileChunks, 1, Len(fileChunks))

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = SubSeq(Seq(1..FILE_SIZE), 1, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ pendingChunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ pendingChunk <= Len(fileChunks)
    /\ channelState' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, retransmitCount, finished>>

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ channelState = "sending"
    /\ channelState' = "ack"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, fileChunks[pendingChunk])
    /\ pendingChunk' = pendingChunk + 1
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, channelState, finished>>

Loss ==
    /\ channelState = "sending"
    /\ channelState' = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, finished>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelState' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, retransmitCount, finished>>

GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, retransmitCount, channelState>>

Finish ==
    /\ pendingChunk > Len(fileChunks)
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, retransmitCount,

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    db,
    txns,
    txnState,
    txnReadSet,
    txnWriteSet,
    nextTxnId

CONSTANTS
    Keys,
    Values

IsActive(t) == txnState[t] = "begin"

BeginTxn(t) ==
    /\ t \notin txns
    /\ txns' = txns \cup {t}
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "begin"]
    /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = {}]
    /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]]
    /\ nextTxnId' = nextTxnId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db>>

Read(t, k) ==
    /\ IsActive(t)
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ txnReadSet' = [txnReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = txnReadSet[t] \cup {k}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, txnState, txnWriteSet, nextTxnId>>

Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ IsActive(t)
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ txnWriteSet' = [txnWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = [txnWriteSet[t] EXCEPT ![k] = v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, txnState, txnReadSet, nextTxnId>>

Commit(t) ==
    /\ IsActive(t)
    /\ \A k \in Keys :
        /\ (k \in DOMAIN txnWriteSet[t] => \A t' \in txns :
                t' /= t /\ IsActive(t') /\ k \in DOMAIN txnWriteSet[t'])
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = IF k \in DOMAIN txnWriteSet[t] THEN txnWriteSet[t][k] ELSE db[k] \FORALL k \in Keys]
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, nextTxnId>>

Abort(t) ==
    /\ IsActive(t)
    /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, txns, txnReadSet, txnWriteSet, nextTxnId>>

Next ==
    \E t \in DOMAIN txnState :
        \/ BeginTxn(t)
        \/ Read(t, CHOOSE k \in Keys : TRUE)
        \/ Write(t, CHOOSE k \in Keys : TRUE, CHOOSE v \in Values : TRUE)
        \/ Commit(t)
        \/ Abort(t)

Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
    /\ txns = {}
    /\ txnState = [t \in {} |-> "begin"]
    /\ txnReadSet = [t \in {} |-> {}]
    /\ txnWriteSet = [t \in {} |-> [k \in Keys |-> NULL]]
    /\ nextTxnId = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, txnState,

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N,          \* Number of nodes
    epsilon,    \* Synchronisation tolerance
    maxDrift    \* Maximum integer drift per round

VARIABLES
    clocks      \* Current clock values of nodes

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0 *)
Init == 
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Drift step: each node may drift by an integer in [-maxDrift, maxDrift] *)
DriftStep == 
    /\ \E drift \in [1..N -> [-maxDrift .. maxDrift]]
    /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + drift[i]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Synchronisation step: each node sets its clock to the average of all clocks *)
SyncStep == 
    /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> Avg(clocks)]

(* Helper: average of a sequence of natural numbers *)
Avg(c) == 
    LET sum == \Sum i \in 1..N : c[i]
    IN sum / N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* One round consists of a drift followed by a synchronisation *)
OneRound == 
    /\ DriftStep
    /\ SyncStep

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: a round is performed in each step *)
Next == OneRound

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_clocks

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Invariant: after any number of rounds, all clocks are within epsilon *)
SyncInvariant == 
    \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* TLC configuration *)

  \/ P0_SetTurn
  \/ P0_Wait
  \/ P0_ClearFlag

  \/ P1_SetTurn
  \/ P1_Wait

(*--------------------------------------------------------------------

  /\ infected = {}
  /\ round = 0

  /\ LET newInfected ==

  Specification: the system evolves according to Init and Next.

TypeOK ==
  /\ infected \subseteq Nodes
  /\ round \in Nat

---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N, Clients, Pages

ASSUME
    Pages = 1..N

VARIABLES
    free, allocated

(* free is the set of currently free pages *)
(* allocated is a function from each client to the subset of pages allocated to that client *)

Init ==
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Allocate a page to a client *)
Allocate(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in free
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]

(* Release a page from a client *)
Release(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next ==
    \/ \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages : Allocate(c, p)
    \/ \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages : Release(c, p)

TypeOK ==
    /\ free \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
    /\ \A p \in Pages : p \in free \/ \E c \in Clients : p \in allocated[c]
    /\ \A p \in Pages : p \in free => \A c \in Clients : ~(p \in allocated[c])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> /\ WF_<<free, allocated>>(Next)

---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, inboxes

(* Types *)
SUBSCRIBER == [id: Nat]
TOPIC == [name: String]
MESSAGE == [topic: TOPIC, content: String, seq: Nat]

(* Helper definitions *)
AllSubscribers == DOMAIN inboxes
AllTopics == DOMAIN messages

(* Initialization *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers = [t \in TOPIC |-> {}]
    /\ messages   = [t \in TOPIC |-> << >>]
    /\ inboxes    = [s \in SUBSCRIBER |-> << >>]

(* Actions *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in SUBSCRIBER
    /\ topic \in TOPIC
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \cup {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED << messages, inboxes >>

Post(pub, topic, content) ==
    /\ pub \in SUBSCRIBER
    /\ topic \in TOPIC
    /\ LET seq == Len(messages[topic]) + 1
       IN  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(@, [topic |-> topic, content |-> content, seq |-> seq])]
           /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT
                            ![s] = IF s \in subscribers[topic]
                                      THEN Append(@, [topic |-> topic, content |-> content, seq |-> seq])
                                      ELSE @]
           /\ UNCHANGED << subscribers >>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E sub \in SUBSCRIBER, topic \in TOPIC :
        Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E pub \in SUBSCRIBER, topic \in TOPIC, content \in String :
        Post(pub, topic, content)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, inboxes>>

(* Invariant: type correctness *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscribers \in [TOPIC -> SUBSCRIBER]
    /\ messages   \in [TOPIC -> Seq(MESSAGE)]
    /\ inboxes    \in [SUBSCRIBER -> Seq(MESSAGE)]

Next ==

     /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = FALSE
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 1
  \/ (* Process 1 *)
     /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[1] = FALSE
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 0
  \/ (* Critical section entry *)
     /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = TRUE
     /\ wants[1] = TRUE
     /\ turn' = turn
     /\ wants' = wants
  \/ (* Critical section exit *)
     /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = TRUE
     /\ wants[1] = TRUE
     /\ turn' = turn
     /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ turn \in {0,1}
  /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Nodes \* Set of node identifiers

VARIABLES counts

(* counts is a function from Nodes to a function from Nodes to Nat *)
(* counts[n][m] is the number of increments node n has seen from node m *)

Init ==
  /\ counts \in [Nodes -> [Nodes -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Nodes: \A m \in Nodes: counts[n][m] = 0

(* Increment operation performed by node i *)
Inc(i) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation between node i and node j *)
Merge(i, j) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT
        ![i][k] = Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k]) : k \in Nodes,
        ![j][k] = Max(counts[j][k], counts[i][k]) : k \in Nodes]

Next ==
  \E i \in Nodes: Inc(i)
  \/ \E i, j \in Nodes: i # j /\ Merge(i, j)

(* Global counter value at node n *)
GlobalCount(n) ==
  \Sum m \in Nodes: counts[n][m]

(* All nodes agree on the same global count *)
Agree ==
  \A n, m \in Nodes: GlobalCount(n) = GlobalCount(m)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_counts

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  counts \in [Nodes -> [Nodes -> Nat]]

VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type definitions *)
N \in Nat

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices in 0..K-1 *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K, 0..K-1)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1

(* Queue is empty when head = tail *)
Empty == head = tail

(* Queue is full when the number of elements equals K *)
Full == Len(q) = K

(* Number of elements in the queue *)
Len(q) == 
  IF Empty THEN 0
  ELSE IF head < tail THEN tail - head
  ELSE K - head + tail

(* Producer operation: enqueues an element e *)
Enqueue(e) == 
  /\ ~Full
  /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 0, tail) \o <<e>> \o SubSeq(q, tail, K)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \bmod K
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer operation: dequeues an element *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ ~Empty
  /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 0, head) \o SubSeq(q, head+1, K)
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \bmod K
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
  \/ \E e \in 0..K-1 : Enqueue(e)
  \/ Dequeue

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

    channelState

    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ channelState \in Seq(Seq(Nat))

SplitFile(file) == 
    IF Len(file) <= CHUNK_SIZE THEN

Init == 
    /\ fileChunks == SplitFile(Seq(1..FILE_SIZE))
    /\ sentChunks == <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount == <<>>
    /\ channelState == <<>>

(* Send a chunk over the channel *)
SendChunk(chunk) == 
    /\ channelState' == channelState \o << chunk >>
    /\ UNCHANGED << fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount >>

(* Receive a chunk from the channel *)
ReceiveChunk(chunk) == 
    /\ channelState' == SubSeq(channelState, 1, Len(channelState) - Len(chunk))
    /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks \o << chunk >>
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount \o << 0 >>
    /\ UNCHANGED << fileChunks, channelState >>

(* Retransmit a chunk *)
RetransmitChunk(chunk, count) == 
    /\ channelState' == channelState \o << chunk >>
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount \o << count + 1 >>
    /\ UNCHANGED << fileChunks, sentChunks, channelState >>

(* Non-deterministic channel loss *)
ChannelLoss(chunk) == 
    /\ channelState' == SubSeq(channelState, 1, Len(channelState) - Len(chunk))
    /\ UNCHANGED << fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount >>

Next ==

            /\ chunk \notin channelState
            /\ \E action \in {SendChunk, RetransmitChunk} :
                /\ action == SendChunk
                \

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES
    txns,      \* Mapping from transaction IDs to their state
    data,      \* Mapping from keys to values
    snapshot,  \* Mapping from transaction IDs to the snapshot they read
    nextTxId   \* Next transaction ID to assign

\* Transaction states
\*   "idle"   : transaction not started
\*   "active" : transaction has begun, may read/write
\*   "committed" : transaction has committed
\*   "aborted" : transaction has aborted

\* Transaction operations
BeginTx(t) == 
    /\ txns[t] = "idle"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = data]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, nextTxId>>

Read(t, k) == 
    /\ txns[t] = "active"
    /\ k \in DOMAIN data
    /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, data, snapshot, nextTxId>>

Write(t, k, v) == 
    /\ txns[t] = "active"
    /\ k \in DOMAIN data
    /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, snapshot, nextTxId>>

Commit(t) == 
    /\ txns[t] = "active"
    /\ \A k \in DOMAIN data :
        \E t' \in DOMAIN txns :
            /\ txns[t'] = "active"
            /\ snapshot[t'][k] = data[k]
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, nextTxId>>

Abort(t) == 
    /\ txns[t] = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, nextTxId>>

StartTx == 
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ txns[nextTxId] = "idle"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = "active"]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = data]
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data>>

\* Next transaction ID
Init == 
    /\ txns = [t \in Nat |-> "idle"]
    /\ data = [k \in {"a", "b", "c"} |-> 0]
    /\ snapshot = [t \in Nat |-> data]
    /\ nextTxId = 1

Next == 
    \/ \E t \in DOMAIN txns : BeginTx(t)
    \/ \E t \in DOMAIN txns, k \in DOMAIN data : Read(t, k)
    \/ \E t \in DOMAIN txns, k \in DOMAIN data, v \in Nat : Write(t, k, v)
    \/ \E t \in DOMAI

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS
    N \in Nat,          \* Number of nodes
    epsilon \in Nat,    \* Synchronisation tolerance
    maxDrift \in Nat     \* Maximum integer drift per round

VARIABLES
    clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]   \* Current clock values of nodes

(* Type invariant: clocks is a function from 1..N to Nat *)
TypeOK == clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]

(* Initialisation: clocks start at 0 *)
Init == clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Helper: compute average of clocks *)
Avg(clocks) == 
    LET sum == \sum i \in 1..N : clocks[i]
    IN sum / N

(* Helper: compute new clock for node i after sync *)
NewClock(i, clocks) ==
    LET avg == Avg(clocks)
        drift == CHOOSE d \in [-maxDrift..maxDrift] : TRUE
    IN avg + drift

(* Next-state relation: all nodes update synchronously *)
Next == 
    LET newClocks == [i \in 1..N |-> NewClock(i, clocks)]
    IN clocks' = newClocks

(* Specification: initialisation followed by synchronous rounds *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_clocks

(* Invariant: after each round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
SyncInvariant == 
    LET minC == \min i \in 1..N : clocks[i]
        maxC == \max i \in 1..N : clocks[i]
    IN maxC - minC <= epsilon

(* The main invariant to be proved *)
MainInvariant == SyncInvariant
====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == 
  /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
  /\ turn = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ flag[0] = FALSE
     /\ flag[1] = FALSE
     /\ turn = 0
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE, ![1] = FALSE]
     /\ turn' = 1
  \/ /\ flag[0] = FALSE
     /\ flag[1] = FALSE
     /\ turn = 1
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![0] = FALSE]
     /\ turn' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES
    known,          \* known[i] is the set of updates node i knows
    infected        \* infected[i] is the set of updates node i has received

CONSTANTS
    N,              \* number of nodes
    Updates         \* set of all possible updates

TypeOK == 
    /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET Updates]
    /\ infected \in [1..N -> SUBSET Updates]

Init == 
    /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup Updates]
        /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup Updates]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
          /\ \A p \in Pages: p \in free <=> \A c \in Clients: p \notin allocated[c]

(* Initial state: all pages are free, no allocations *)
Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Client requests a page *)
Request(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                 /\ p \in free
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \union {p}]
                 /\ free' = free \ {p}

(* Client releases a page *)
Release(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                 /\ p \in allocated[c]
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \setminus {p}]
                 /\ free' = free \cup {p}

(* Next state: either a request or a release *)
Next == \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages:
          \/ Request(c, p)
          \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES
    subscribers, \* [topic -> SUBSCRIBER_SET]
    messages,    \* [topic -> MESSAGE_SEQ]
    nextMsgId,   \* [topic -> Nat]
    delivered    \* [topic -> [subscriber -> MESSAGE_SEQ]]

(* Types *)
SUBSCRIBER_SET == SUBSET SUBSCRIBER
MESSAGE_SEQ == SEQ MESSAGE
SUBSCRIBER == SUBSET SUBSCRIBER_ID
MESSAGE == [id: Nat, content: MESSAGE_CONTENT]
MESSAGE_CONTENT == SUBSET MESSAGE_CONTENT_ID
SUBSCRIBER_ID == SUBSET SUBSCRIBER_ID
MESSAGE_CONTENT_ID == SUBSET MESSAGE_CONTENT_ID

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ subscribers \in [topic -> SUBSCRIBER_SET]
    /\ messages \in [topic -> MESSAGE_SEQ]
    /\ nextMsgId \in [topic -> Nat]
    /\ delivered \in [topic -> [subscriber -> MESSAGE_SEQ]]
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN subscribers:
        delivered[topic] \in [subscriber \in subscribers[topic] -> MESSAGE_SEQ]
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN messages:
        \A msg \in messages[topic]:
            msg \in MESSAGE
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN nextMsgId:
        nextMsgId[topic] \in Nat
    /\ \A topic \in DOMAIN delivered:
        \A subscriber \in DOMAIN delivered[topic]:
            delivered[topic][subscriber] \in MESSAGE_SEQ

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ subscribers = [topic \in DOMAIN topics -> {}]
    /\ messages = [topic \in DOMAIN topics -> <<>>]
    /\ nextMsgId = [topic \in DOMAIN topics -> 0]
    /\ delivered = [topic \in DOMAIN topics -> [subscriber \in subscribers[topic] -> <<>>]]

(* Actions *)
Register(subscriber, topic) == 
    /\ subscriber \in SUBSCRIBER_ID
    /\ topic \in DOMAIN topics
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {subscriber}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId, delivered>>

PostMessage(content, topic) == 
    /\ content \in MESSAGE_CONTENT
    /\ topic \in DOMAIN topics
    /\ msgId = nextMsgId[topic]
    /\ msg = [id |-> msgId, content |-> content]
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
    /\ nextMsgId

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLE counts

(* counts is a function Node -> [Node -> Nat] *)

Init ==
  /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
  /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n][n] = 0
  /\ \A n \in Node, m \in Node: n # m => counts[n][m] = 0

Increment(n) ==
  /\ n \in Node
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

Merge ==
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(@, counts[m][n]) : n \in Node, m \in Node]

Next ==
  \/ \E n \in Node: Increment(n)
  \/ Merge

GlobalCount ==
  \A n \in Node: Max(\E m \in Node: counts[m][n])

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_counts

TypeOK ==
  /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
  /\ \A n \in Node, m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

====
